title: K-200 Battery Subsystem Specification
text:
# K-200 Battery Subsystem Specification

Document number: MD-DOC-488-A. Revision: A. Type: specification. Author: Lena Okafor. Created: 2024-01-13. Last modified: 2024-12-12. Status: Released.

This document defines the requirements, interfaces, and verification approach for the Battery subsystem of the Kestrel K-200. Referenced parts: P-1008, P-1111, P-1168, P-1043.
